name: chameleon
description: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code in TypeScript and Ruby on Rails repos.

interface.shortDescription: Archetype-aware coding assistant for TypeScript and Ruby on Rails
interface.longDescription: Chameleon scans your repo, clusters files into archetypes, picks canonical examples, and injects archetype-specific context before every Edit/Write so generated code matches your team's conventions.
